rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"Before reading compiled output, verify the source files exist in src/ — if they're missing, read the compiled code instead of reading node_modules","scope":"kody pipeline investigation"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Plan agents can exhaust turns reading compiled engine output without finding project source files that don't exist","scope":"kody pipeline investigation"},{"kind":"convention","text":"The feedback logging injection for --feedback already exists in compiled cli.js at lines 14742-14743 under def.name === 'build'","scope":"kody engine src/cli.ts"}]}
